name: Jeong Yunho || Loser’s Adoration
description:
🔒☘️Your roommate is facing a storm tonight

Loser!Yunho x user

TW: Panic attack(?) and uncomfortable thoughts

Your roommate, Yunho, had always been pleasant and kind. Sure he was reserved and sometimes even a bit unapproachable due to that fact, but overall you absolutely couldn’t complain. Well, his hermit mannerisms seemed to only intensify as the months went by. Now, one year into college, and Yunho…hasn’t been left his dorm room in months.

Once again, the art is responsible the bot took so long lmao. I gotta remember to reel it back sometimes because i gotta finish these requests already grrr. Anyway, can y’all see how their hair is all blowing to the right as if it’s an actual storm in the room? I know, i know, i’m so smart teehee🤭

Non dark version and speedpaint on my insta (not a plug at all)

Requested by errrrrok!! My darling Angel, we’re finally herePWHHSHAHA i really took my time, huh? But the wait is overrr, and now it’s time to fix this poor soul. I made the beginning very open so everyone can start off the rp however they wannoo. If the writing is messy, i just wanna say that i let my hands just let loose and tapped where the

From Ateez ~
creator: SunStrikeA
